description: EVAL-01 golden (EN, political/organization). Golden reference + a high-quality candidate that should score >= 0.80. Synthetic data only.

input.descEn: A nine-member regional body coordinating maritime security and search-and-rescue.
input.descAr: هيئة إقليمية تضم تسعة أعضاء تنسق الأمن البحري وعمليات البحث والإنقاذ.

golden.summary: The Northern Maritime Forum is a nine-member regional body coordinating maritime security and joint search-and-rescue. Its rotating chair passes to a new member next month, and a revised information-sharing protocol awaits ratification by three members.

sections.title: Mandate and Membership
sections.content: Nine member states coordinate on maritime domain awareness, anti-smuggling patrols, and search-and-rescue. The chair rotates annually and transfers next month.

sections.title: Current Agenda
sections.content: A revised information-sharing protocol has been adopted in principle but still needs ratification by three members. A joint exercise is planned for the autumn.

sections.title: Engagement Notes
sections.content: The forum favors consensus decisions, so bilateral pre-coordination with the incoming chair is the most effective channel for advancing proposals.

candidate.summary: The Northern Maritime Forum brings together nine member states to coordinate maritime security and search-and-rescue. The chair rotates to a new member next month, and a new information-sharing protocol is pending ratification by three members.

sections.title: Mandate and Membership
sections.content: The forum's nine members cooperate on maritime awareness, anti-smuggling operations, and search-and-rescue. Chairmanship rotates yearly, with the handover due next month.

sections.title: Current Agenda
sections.content: Members agreed in principle to a revised information-sharing protocol, which three of them have yet to ratify. An autumn joint exercise is on the calendar.

sections.title: Engagement Notes
sections.content: Decisions are reached by consensus, so coordinating bilaterally with the incoming chair ahead of meetings is the best way to move a proposal forward.
